---
title: "VAR Predictability Benchmark"
subtitle: "Results"
author: 
 - name: Björn S. Siepe
   orcid: 0000-0002-9558-4648
   affiliations: University of Marburg
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    fig-width: 7
    fig-height: 4.5
    fig-align: "center"
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  eval: true
---

<!--
Read-only report. Reads cached results from output/results/ and output/meta/
and never refits. Produces the main tables and figures:
  - predictability across the complexity ladder (person-level conditional R²)
  - in-sample vs out-of-sample R² gap (a deliverable in its own right)
  - meta-regression of moderators on person-level R²
  - secondary: standardized RMSE
Figures written to figures/.
-->

```{r setup}
#| include: false
# source("../R/00_functions.R"); source("../R/config.R")
# TODO: implement.
```
